zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报9.1301，24小时跌幅0.86%，价格运行于近期低位区域。现价低于20日均线9.1662，说明短线空头仍占据一定优势，市场动能偏弱，整体处于震荡偏空格局，反弹力度暂时有限。

从技术指标观察，MACD值为-0.0163，处于零轴下方，反映市场仍存在一定下行压力。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格表现与均线位置判断，短期买盘力量不足，投资者情绪相对谨慎，趋势尚未出现明确反转信号。

关键支撑位关注9.12附近，该区域接近日内低点，若失守可能进一步测试9.00整数关口。上方首要阻力位位于9.17至9.21区间，对应20日均线及日内高点位置，突破后有望打开更大的反弹空间。

交易策略方面，稳健投资者可等待价格重新站稳20日均线后再考虑顺势布局。短线交易者可关注9.12支撑与9.21阻力之间的区间波动，高抛低吸为主，并严格设置止损，防范弱势行情下的进一步回落风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading in a mildly bearish short-term structure after a modest intraday decline. Price action remains compressed near the lower boundary of the day’s range, suggesting weakening buying pressure. The pair is hovering below its 20-period simple moving average, indicating a loss of near-term bullish momentum. Overall trend bias leans sideways to bearish unless buyers manage to reclaim and hold above recent intraday highs with stronger conviction and volume support.

The MACD reading at -0.016 confirms bearish momentum is gradually building, though the absence of a signal line value limits full crossover confirmation. Trading below the SMA(20) at 9.16621 reinforces short-term weakness and highlights seller control over recent price action. Without RSI data, momentum must be interpreted through structure and moving averages alone. The current setup suggests consolidation with a slight downside skew rather than a fully established trend reversal or breakdown.

Immediate support is located at the intraday low of 9.1215, which is acting as a key short-term demand area. A decisive break below this level would expose the psychological 9.10 zone and potentially open room for further downside continuation. On the upside, initial resistance sits at the SMA(20) near 9.16621, followed closely by the session high at 9.2084. A sustained move above these levels would be required to shift momentum back in favor of buyers.

Trading conditions currently favor a cautious, range-driven approach until a clear breakout is confirmed in either direction. Short setups may be considered on a firm breakdown below 9.1215 with confirming downside momentum, while long positions become more attractive only on a recovery above 9.166 followed by a break and hold above 9.2084. Given the tight intraday range, disciplined risk control is essential to avoid whipsaw moves.
